particulars.description: Each of the items of equipment, sanwa ss 1989 cut and crease with s/no:150 and sanwa SE 1995 cut and crease with s/no:2000795 a fixed charge on all present and future policies of insurance in respect of the equipment and/or other chattel(s) and all rights and claims see image for full details.
